details.productUrlName: Let the Galaxy Burn Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom of your library in a random order.)
Let the Galaxy Burn deals X plus 2 damage to each creature that didn't enter the battlefield this turn.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
